title: flaky herbal american sick-day dish
description: soothing comfort food for when you're feeling under the weather, featuring a flaky crust and fragrant herbal flavors
instructions: mash the butter with a fork until it's softened
add the parsley, dill, and garlic powder to the butter and mash until well combined
add the water to the butter mixture and mash until the dough starts to come together
turn the dough out onto a floured surface and knead until it's smooth and elastic
roll the dough out to a thickness of about 1/8 inch
cut the dough into 4-6 triangles, depending on how large you want your biscuits to be
place the triangles on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper
bake in a preheated oven at 375 degrees for 18-22 minutes, or until the biscuits are golden brown
